title: Arundinaria lima
taxonomy: Arundinaria lima is classified as a species of bamboo in the family Poaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Bambusoideae and the tribe Bambuseae. Within this tribe, Arundinaria lima is further grouped into the genus Arundinaria. Arundinaria is a genus of bamboo that is native to the Americas. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this plant species.
